extra.reason: Completed by Sandcastle. Created Extractor class as testable seam (19 tests), fixed total_words never-incremented bug in detect.py. Ref: plan/improve/03-deepen-extraction-pipeline.md

Completed by Sandcastle. Collapsed hybrid_search() god function into GraphSearcher class with search() and multi_search() interface. hybrid_search() kept as backward-compat wrapper. 7 new unit tests, all 112 tests passing, ruff+mypy clean.

Completed by Sandcastle. Introduced PipelineFacade class that owns config, ChromaDB wiring, and repo_map. API layer no longer imports private symbols (_env_path) or internals (ChromaConfig, EmbeddingConfig, PipelineConfig). 13 new unit tests, all 125 tests passing, ruff+mypy clean.
